name: Jezebel Sauces
recipeIngredient: 1000 ISLAND SALAD DRESSING: 1 cup Jezebel sauce, 1 cup Mayo, 1 cup Ketchup
recipeInstructions:
BBQ SAUCE:
1. Combine apple jelly, horseradish, pineapple sundae topping, and mustard in a blender.
2. Blend on high speed for about one minute or until smooth.
3. Refrigerate covered to use within 60 days or freeze to thaw and use within 1 year.
BBQ BASTING SAUCE:
1. Blend BBQ sauce, Cataline dressing, and Heinz 57 sauce.
2. Use for basting chicken, pork, or beef.
SALAD DRESSING:
1. Combine Jezebel sauce, Mayo, and ketchup in a bowl.
2. Refrigerate to use within 30 days.
